summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the Akansha Jain portfolio redesign (5 variants). All 9 listed test scenarios verified. Core functionality (variant switching, persistence, panel toggle, sections, images, archive filter, contact CTAs) works correctly. Found one minor issue: hero-cta-primary is missing target=_blank attribute across all variants. No browser console errors detected.

ui_bugs.issue: hero-cta-primary anchor has correct href (https://sessionize.com/akanshajain/) but is MISSING target="_blank" and rel="noopener noreferrer" attributes. Review request explicitly requires target=_blank for this external link. contact-cta-0 and contact-cta-1 correctly have target=_blank.

test_results.TEST_1_default_load_editorial_variant: PASS - default variant=editorial, hero headline 'Engineering code. Inspiring communities.' rendered (text spans multiple lines)
test_results.TEST_2_variant_switcher_swatch_buttons: PASS - all 5 swatch buttons (editorial/brutalism/luxury/playful/swiss) switch [data-variant] correctly
test_results.TEST_3_localStorage_persistence: PASS - key 'akansha-redesign-variant' is set; brutalism survives page reload
test_results.TEST_4_panel_toggle_and_rows: PASS - variant-switcher-toggle opens variant-switcher-panel; all 5 variant-row-* buttons present and functional
test_results.TEST_5_all_sections_present: PASS - 5 talk cards, 8 leadership items, 2 codelabs, 2 contact CTAs, 6 stat values (54+, 12+, 28K+, 21+, 8+, 105K+) all present
test_results.TEST_6_external_images_load: PASS - headshot.png, speakng.jpg, speaker_of_the_day_sessionize.png all loaded (naturalWidth > 0)
test_results.TEST_7_archive_filter_tabs: PASS - 'all' shows 8 cards; 'international' filters down to 1 card
test_results.TEST_8_external_cta_hrefs: PARTIAL - hero-cta-primary href correct but target=_blank MISSING (all 5 variants). contact-cta-0 -> sessionize (target=_blank OK), contact-cta-1 -> linkedin (target=_blank OK)
test_results.TEST_9_no_console_errors: PASS - 0 console errors captured during full session

action_items: Add target="_blank" and rel="noopener noreferrer" to hero-cta-primary anchor in /app/frontend/src/components/sections/Hero.jsx for all 5 variants (editorial, brutalism, luxury, playful, swiss). The href is correct (https://sessionize.com/akanshajain/) but the link currently navigates in same tab.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero.jsx hero-cta-primary anchor lacks target=_blank/rel=noopener for external link - security and UX concern (replace same-tab navigation away from portfolio).
Portfolio.jsx invokes window.scrollTo on every variant change (smooth) - intentional but may feel jarring; minor UX note.
VariantSwitcher mobile breakpoint hides inline swatches (md:flex) — verified behavior matches the agent_to_agent_context_note; ensure toggle button width remains tap-friendly on small screens.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (1 minor missing attribute on hero CTA out of all listed assertions)

test_credentials: N/A - portfolio app has no auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 variants render correctly with full sections. localStorage persistence works under key 'akansha-redesign-variant'. The single remaining issue is hero-cta-primary missing target=_blank in Hero.jsx (5 occurrences, one per variant). After main agent adds the attribute, a single Playwright check on the rendered <a target="_blank"> across all 5 variants is enough to verify.
rca_of_the_issue: hero-cta-primary anchor element in Hero.jsx is rendered as <a href=... data-testid='hero-cta-primary'> without target/rel attributes. Other external CTAs (contact-cta-0, contact-cta-1) include target=_blank, so this looks like an oversight per-variant. Fix: add target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" to each variant's primary CTA anchor.
